method.step_1: Filter manual_review_keep items where section_number begins with 9., 10., 11., or matches integer prefix mapping to Chapter 9 (3-digit 9xx), Chapter 10 (4-digit 10xx), or Chapter 11 (4-digit 11xx).
method.step_2: For each priority match, attempt extraction with pymupdf round3-priority extractor across +/- 60 page sweep.
method.step_3: Apply strict quality gate (>= 200 chars, contains section ref verbatim, non-letter ratio < 30%) before write.
method.step_4: Enforce zero Section symbol on every output.

finding: Zero of the 101 manual_review_keep items belong to Chapter 9 (Fire Protection), Chapter 10 (Egress / Life Safety), or Chapter 11 (Existing Buildings). All sections in chapters 9, 10, 11 of this dataset were already addressed by prior rounds: round 1 / round 2 resolved 1104 (Ch 11) and the existing main sbc801/ extraction directory contains complete coverage of 901-917, 1001-1032, and 1101-1108 sections. No further priority resolutions are possible from this input.
